STM32F407VG quick notes
VDD supply voltage range must be checked in the official datasheet before powering the board.
HSE oscillator can be used with an external crystal and PLL clock tree.
BOOT0 selects the boot mode during reset.
SWD debug uses PA13 SWDIO and PA14 SWCLK.
Flash memory and SRAM sizes depend on the exact ordering code.
USART, I2C, SPI, CAN, ADC, timers, PWM and USB peripherals are available by package variant.
Absolute maximum ratings and GPIO current limits must not be exceeded.
Errata documents may list silicon limitations and workarounds.
